title: Boston police looking to identify man who allegedly assaulted Downtown Crossing worker
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News The suspect allegedly punched and kicked the worker before placing him in a headlock, police say.
A photo of the suspect accused of physically and verbally assaulting an employee in the area of Downtown Crossing.
Boston Police Department Boston police are seeking the public’s help in identifying a man who is suspected of physically assaulting an employee in the Downtown Crossing area on Friday.

title: Red-hot Red Sox extend winning streak to 14, topping Orioles 6-5
author: The Associated Press
bullets: Boston Red Sox The Red Sox would match a club record with a win Tuesday night.
Boston won 15 straight in 1946 on a team led by future Hall of Famer Ted Williams.
Jarren Duran (left) greets Caleb Durbin at home plate after Durbin hit a solo home run to give the Red Sox the lead in the eighth inning.

title: Cyclist, 83, hit and killed by pickup truck on the Cape
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News The victim, whose identity has not been released, died in the hospital.

title: South Station Starbucks license suspended following viral video of rodents in shop
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News The inspection report notes evidence of fruit flies, mouse droppings, and rodent activity, leading the department to deem an “imminent health hazard exists” at the Starbucks site.
Authorities have temporarily suspended the license of the Starbucks at South Station after a viral video surfaced showing multiple rodents inside the coffee shop.
Boston Inspectional Services conducted an evaluation of the Starbucks, located at 700 Atlantic Ave.

title: 1 woman killed, another injured in late-night Taunton crash
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Local News The driver, 26-year-old Selina Mendez, was rushed to a local hospital with life-threatening injuries and died soon after.
By Abby Patkin July 20, 2026 | 2:26 PM 1 minute to read One woman was killed and another injured late Friday night in a single-car crash in Taunton, authorities said.
Taunton police and emergency medics responded to a crash near 266 County St.

title: Celtics announce full 2026 preseason schedule
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Boston Celtics The Celtics will play Philadelphia twice during the four-game preseason.
Hugo Gonzalez AP Photo/Michael Dwyer The Celtics released their four-game preseason schedule on Monday, and half of the matchups involve Jaylen Brown’s new team.
Boston will have a home and home series with Philadelphia, along with a road contest in Cleveland, and a home game against Charlotte.

title: State Police colonel: ‘Hundreds, if not thousands’ of Proctor’s cases may need review
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Local News “To me, every single case that Michael Proctor worked on needs to be looked at.
